DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
token-api token-value token
style
pattern

DSDS Token Definition

Documentation for a single design token — its name, type, value, platform API mappings, use cases, guidelines, and accessibility considerations.

Source: tokens/token.schema.json

tokenDoc

Documentation for a single design token.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe token name. Token names are intentionally unconstrained by a pattern to accommodate DTCG and design tool naming conventions that use dots, slashes, or other separators (e.g., 'color-text-primary', 'color.text.primary', 'color/text/primary').
displayNamestringrequiredHuman-readable name.
descriptionrichTextrequired
statusstatusrequired
tokenTypestringrequiredThe type of token aligned with the DTCG spec (e.g., 'color', 'dimension', 'fontFamily', 'fontWeight', 'duration', 'cubicBezier', 'shadow').
summarystringoptionalA one-line, plain-text summary. MUST NOT contain markup.
deprecationNoticestringoptionalRequired when status is 'deprecated'.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this token was introduced.
tagsstring[]optionalFreeform keywords to relate guidelines across categories/disciplines (e.g., 'rtl', 'localization', 'validation').
categorystringoptionalThe token's semantic category. Standard values: 'base' (raw palette values, not used directly in components), 'semantic' (purpose-driven tokens that map to base values, e.g., 'color-text-primary'), 'component' (tokens scoped to a specific component, e.g., 'button-background'). Custom values are permitted and SHOULD be lowercase kebab-case.
valuetokenValueoptional
aliasesstring[]optionalNames of tokens that alias this token.
apitokenApioptional
useCasesuseCasesoptional
guidelinesguideline[]optionalUsage guidelines for the token. Each entry is a self-contained guideline. Use the `category` property on individual guidelines to group by concern (e.g., 'design', 'accessibility', 'content').
accessibilityaccessibilityObjectoptional
linkslink[]optionalExternal resource links and related artifact references.
$extensionsextensionsoptional

Conditional: When status is "deprecated", then deprecationNotice is required.

References: richText, status, tokenValue, tokenApi, useCases, guideline, accessibilityObject, link, extensions

Example

{
  "name": "color-text-primary",
  "displayName": "Text Primary",
  "description": "The default color for body text, headings, and labels. Provides the highest-contrast text color for standard reading content on default background surfaces.",
  "status": "stable",
  "since": "2.0.0",
  "tokenType": "color",
  "category": "semantic",
  "summary": "Default body text color for light and dark surfaces.",
  "tags": [
    "color",
    "text",
    "body"
  ],
  "value": {
    "resolved": "#1a1a1a",
    "reference": "color.neutral.900",
    "dtcgFile": "./tokens/color.tokens.json"
  },
  "aliases": [
    "color.text.default",
    "color.text.body"
  ],
  "api": {
    "cssCustomProperty": "--color-text-primary",
    "scssVariable": "$color-text-primary",
    "jsConstant": "colorTextPrimary",
    "iosToken": "Color.Text.primary",
    "androidToken": "colorTextPrimary",
    "designToolVariable": "color/text/primary"
  },
  "useCases": {
    "whenToUse": [
      {
        "description": "When applying color to body text, headings, and form labels on default background surfaces."
      },
      {
        "description": "When building components that display primary reading content that must adapt across color modes."
      }
    ],
    "whenNotToUse": [
      {
        "description": "When placing text on dark or colored background surfaces.",
        "alternative": {
          "name": "color-text-inverse",
          "rationale": "This token is optimized for contrast against light backgrounds. Using it on dark or saturated surfaces will fail contrast requirements."
        }
      },
      {
        "description": "When the text is inside a component that supplies its own scoped color tokens (e.g., text on a filled button).",
        "alternative": {
          "name": "color-text-on-action",
          "rationale": "Component-scoped tokens account for the specific background they sit on. Applying a general text token to a scoped context risks contrast failures."
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "guidelines": [
    {
      "guidance": "Use for all body text, headings, and form labels on default background surfaces.",
      "rationale": "A single primary text color ensures visual consistency and meets WCAG 2.1 AA contrast requirements against the system's default background.",
      "type": "encouraged",
      "category": "visual-design"
    },
    {
      "guidance": "Do not override this token's value at the component level. Use color-text-secondary or color-text-tertiary for reduced emphasis.",
      "rationale": "Overriding the primary text color creates inconsistency. The system provides lower-emphasis text tokens for visual hierarchy.",
      "type": "prohibited",
      "category": "visual-design"
    },
    {
      "guidance": "This color meets a 15.3:1 contrast ratio against color-background-default in light mode.",
      "rationale": "Exceeds WCAG 2.1 AAA requirements (7:1 for normal text), ensuring readability for users with low vision.",
      "type": "informational",
      "category": "accessibility",
      "criteria": [
        "https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG22/#contrast-minimum",
        "https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG22/#contrast-enhanced"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "accessibility": {
    "wcagLevel": "AAA",
    "colorContrast": [
      {
        "foreground": "color-text-primary",
        "background": "color-background-default",
        "contrastRatio": 15.3,
        "level": "AAA",
        "context": "Primary text on default background in light mode."
      },
      {
        "foreground": "color-text-primary",
        "background": "color-background-subtle",
        "contrastRatio": 13.8,
        "level": "AAA",
        "context": "Primary text on subtle background (card surface) in light mode."
      }
    ]
  },
  "links": [
    {
      "type": "source",
      "url": "https://code.acme.com/design-system/src/tokens/color/text.tokens.json",
      "label": "Token source file"
    },
    {
      "type": "documentation",
      "url": "https://design.acme.com/tokens/color-text-primary",
      "label": "Token documentation"
    },
    {
      "type": "related",
      "url": "https://design.acme.com/tokens/color-text-secondary",
      "label": "color-text-secondary"
    },
    {
      "type": "related",
      "url": "https://design.acme.com/tokens/color-text-tertiary",
      "label": "color-text-tertiary"
    }
  ]
}
↑ Back to top
